title: Crawling Chaos
description: Crawling Chaos is an mod that aims on recreate the Abandoned mod Anti Plants Virus mod of the 1.6.2 on the Modern Minecraft
body:
![Crawling Chaos Text Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/8ece09c5e0657a4199b063b5ef7053142913b932.webp)


This mod recreates the old [Anti Plants Virus mod](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1289758-anti-plant-virus-mod)
It is planned to bring all the mobs and features to modern Minecraft, as well as adding new content, but I will take creative liberties.

**About the mod:**
This mod focuses on huge insects and a virus that affects plants with which you can have several uses.
Bugs and insects will be able to spawn all over the world but will be found more easily in the new biome, the Bug Forest.
There will also be bosses but these will spawn exclusively in the new biome
Like every mod, this one will also add new tools and armor, which can also be improved with the current mechanics of template upgrades and armor trims from modern Minecraft.

As I said, I'll take the creative liberty of adding new things in addition to the content already existing in the original mod, so you can expect more mobs and other offtopic things like food and tools.

**Requires [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) otherwise the new biome will not work**

**The features of the mod focuses on the new biome, the Bug Forest:**

<details>
<summary>Bug Forest</summary>

![Bug Forest Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/9352a0693918fcabd84f206082d6f2e3b8375eaf.png)

A beautiful biome of an curious color with a new type of tree and new vegetation

Here you have a seed with the biome in the spawn: 7874759162448879384



The new Bug Oak tree includes a complete set of blocks and objects:

![Bug Oak Set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/c6751f45e5be309e92d56b7087b6a568b1d287c3.png)

Ancient Exoskeleton Stone: a new ore that will appear exclusively in this biome, its rarity to find is more or less like iron ore, can be picked with an iron pickaxe or higher, when mining it will give a new item, the Ancient exoskeleton, it will be used to make two new items the Serupinea Lining and the Knight Lining

![Ancient Exoskeleton Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7fdb54aa3e020cc6c858d511f3ee610daf2de80.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mobs of the mod</summary>

<details>
<summary>Knight Bug</summary>

![Knight Bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/e62b5a3605f80ef8849d13adc800cb4126e898bc.webp)

The boss of the mod is a giant beetle that has 200 lives and knockback resistance.

This mob is not finished yet but it will have many combat mechanics.

This mob will drop Crystal of the Virus that you can use to trade with the Loneger, and it will also drop Knight Exoskeleton that you can use to make the Knight Armor upgrading serupinea armor (requires an upgrade template that is currently only obtained in creative)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Serupinea</summary>

![Serupinea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/fdf467df46003dea619ce73b9ca7fd3b9c463514.webp)

A carrion-loving insect, it will spawn in biomes such as Forest, Plains, Jungle, Swamp, and primarily in Bug Forest. It is resistant to knockback.

It will drop rotten flesh and its exoskeleton, which can be used to craft a new set of tools and iron-enhanced armor.

It requires a new template upgrade, which the Loneger will trade you in his Bug Forest cabin. It may appear with a very low probability in a chest in the cabin.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Parasite Worm and Eroded Zombie</summary>
  
![Parasite Worm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/554efbf5e495f0df7f333c257c2f07d602d2bd03.webp)

This worm will infect the zombies and turn them into an Eroded Zombie

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZfYWhoxJIqQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

~

the Parasite Worm will only infect normal zombies, ignoring the drowned, although it will try to attack the Husks without managing to infect them because they are too dry to be able to live in them.

![Eroded Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/017c65fde7c2e8dba324e0640fda25df438cb561.png)

Eroded Zombies have 60 health, will poison any living entity it hits and will spit acid when the player or another entity hits it or throws a projectile at it, and because the worms manipulate them they have an intelligence bonus, they will avoid the sun by hiding under the shade or getting into the water to avoid getting burned.

When you kill the Eroded Zombie, it will drop 2 to 4 parasite worms.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Acarus</summary>
  
![Acarus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/54bd33aab95fd11de9164559b9f2bc3307cb66c7.webp)

an new spider that will appear at night in the bug forest biome, when it attacks you it will give you Mining Fatigue and Slowness

TRIVIA: They are based on some spiders that appeared in the Madagascar video game in a part called "Mysterious Jungle", A video game that me LambdaLuke87, played as a kid back in the 2000s.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Loneger</summary>

![Loneger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/97a4b1696946c0d67a07970a97385404223d7d47.webp)

A solitary and hermit villager from Bug Forest that you can find in a cabin, he will trade you a wide variety of items, his main currency is the Crystal of the Virus, dropped by the Knight Bug.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Prism Frog</summary>

![Prism Frog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/1dbc9936bdb86d4ca478aa0f70864c7a6693b552.png)

A frog based on the poison dart frogs, but these are twice as big as the vanilla frogs, at the moment there is only one variant skin available

</details>

<details>
<summary>Skeleton Friend</summary>

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/d23211d20705a6f814dcbc787fdc02051b798506.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/d23211d20705a6f814dcbc787fdc02051b798506.png)

An allied skeleton that won't attack you. It will attack any hostile mob. You can equip him with armor and an item in his hand such as an Armor Stand.

To summon it you will need a **Soulbone Cauldron** block and throw a skeleton skull on it.

those Skeletons can be Upgraded with new Skills and skins, you need craft some new items to upgrade your skeleton friends right clicking with them

**Bone Flame Upgrade**: Turn it in a **Burn Skeleton Friend**, it will become resistant to fire and its melee and ranged attacks with arrows will burn the enemy.

**Bone Frozen Upgrade**: Turn it in a **Snowy Skeleton Friend**, his ranged attacks with arrows and melee attacks will give to the enemy Slowness effect

**Bone Mossy Upgrade**: Turn it in a **Mossy Skeleton Friend**, his ranged attacks with arrows and melee attacks will give to the enemy Poison effect

**Bone Obsidian Upgrade**: Turn it in a **Obsidian Skeleton Friend**, it will become resistant to fire and blast damage, in addition it will have the Resistance II effect permanently.

**Bone Withered Upgrade**: Turn it in a **Withered Skeleton Friend**, his ranged attacks with arrows and melee attacks will give to the enemy Wither effect

![Skeleton Friend Upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/2559c5f15bb465ae92d856d43605a45f18b99c2e.png)

The Burned and Obsidian skins are based on an old mod abandoned in 1.7.2, [Mo' Skeletons Mod](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/2223725-1-7-2-1-7-10mo-skeletons-mod-v2-0-2-added-skeleton)

The one from Mossy is a skeleton from Minecraft Dungeons

</details>

<details>
<summary>Carrier Bug</summary>

![Carrier Bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af76f7107e31c15858124fae6ae2aad1ee5669f4.png)

A type of spider whose mechanics are yet to be implemented, but you can still find it in the Bug Forest.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Helena</summary>

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/a40fbafca05007ef8c58150cf12fde376b28ddb8.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/a40fbafca05007ef8c58150cf12fde376b28ddb8.png)

This butterfly will poison you when touched, but the mechanic hasn't been implemented yet :p

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Functional Items, Armor, Tools and Edibles</summary>



**Test Tube:** A small glass bottle that is crafted with 3 glass blocks vertically, you will get 3, like the Glass Bottle you can fill them with water by right clicking and thus you can obtain the following item below

**Test Tube with Water:** You could drink it but it won't give you any effect, this item will help you make new types of potions, the Formulas, This item and all formulas can be stacked at 16 unlike potions which you can only stack at 1

**Anti Plant Virus Template:** It is a glass ampoule that depending on which plants you right-click on, it will give you a different item.

 -on Oak Saplings/Dark/Pale to get the **Anti Plant Virus A** 
 
 -on short grass, poppy, dandelion to get the **Anti Plant Virus B** 
 
 -on Bug Oak Saplings to get the **Anti Plant Virus C** 
 
 *at the moment the viruses A, B and C their functions are not implemented yet, but they will work to erase vegetation such as trees and grass with a single click (it will make them disappear and you will not obtain the materials from them)
 
<details>
<summary>Edibles</summary>

**Jelly Apple:** it's just the fruit of the Bug Oak Tree

**Blight Rotten Flesh:** sometimes the Eroded Zombie will drop it instead of the normal Rotten Flesh, this will give you Hunger II for 30 seconds and a 50% of chance to give you Poison for 15 seconds

**Formula of Abyssal Gaze:** gives you Water Breathing and Night Vision for 2 minutes but it will aslo give you Blindness for 1 minute and 20 seconds

**Formula of Crimson Burst:** gives you Speed II and Haste II for 2 minutes but it will aslo give you Hunger II for 1 minute and 20 seconds
  
**Formula of Moonlight:** gives you Night Vision for 25 seconds

**Formula of Phantom Limbs:** gives you Jump Boost III and Slow Falling for 2 minutes but it will aslo give you Weakness II for 1 minute and 20 seconds

**Formula of Poison Vermilion:** gives you Strength II for 2 minutes but it will also give you Poison for 20 seconds

**Formula of Purification:** gives you Health Boost III for 2 minutes but it will also give you Slowness II and Mining Fatigue for 1 minute and 20 seconds

**Formula of Voltaic Surge:** gives you Speed III and Resistance for 2 minutes but it will aslo give you Weakness II for 1 minute and 20 seconds

**Luminous Chicken Stew:** a stew maked with Mycena Chlorophos mushroom with Cooked Chicken, gives you Night Vision for 40 seconds.

**Hyourougan:** a disgusting, murky mix of ingredients that will give you Health Boost II for 50 seconds.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Armor and Tools</summary>

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/81dce389bfbe61e15e4afcffad188b3edd0059cb.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/81dce389bfbe61e15e4afcffad188b3edd0059cb.png)

**Serupinea Set:** it is an iron upgrade armor that is made from the Serupinea Lining, you will need to find the Serupinea Upgrade item in the Loneger's cabin, either by trading it or by finding it in one of his chests with a very low probability.

**Knight Armor:** It is an upgrade of Serupinea's armor made from the Knight Lining, it will require the Knight Upgrade, it will be created with the Serupinea Upgrade surrounded by the Knight Exoskeleton

and of course both armors can be trimmed on the smithing table

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Decorative and functional Blocks</summary>

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/5fd05101b724d37dd67bb1c3406b7864ed506b92.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p8c8bY5G/images/5fd05101b724d37dd67bb1c3406b7864ed506b92.png)

**Fertile Slime Block:**
Your crops are safe with this new farmland kind of block, this block unlike a slime block, when falling on it, it will not protect you 100% and you will bounce very little. It is crafted with 8 Slime Blocks surrounding a Mud block.

![Soulbone Cauldron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1473941d9d1506d63e794460bd59faa34002d7bf.png)

**Soulbone Cauldron**
It is used to summon the Skeleton Friend by throwing a skeleton skull on it.

I decided to add some decorative blocks from another mod: **[The Mists of RioV](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-mists-of-riov)**. They were very nice blocks, but unfortunately, that mod hasn't been updated since 1.7.10. All credits to **[Sheenrox82](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sheenrox82_/projects)**

![Some decorative blocks of the Mists of RioV](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82712729540684088432afea993a6ab9952d23b8.png)

**Lamp Block:** 
an lamp that can be turned on/off with right click

**Soul Lamp Block:**
Soul variant of Lamp Block, of course the piglins will be afraid of this block.

**Pattern Glass Blocks:** (A Field of Colorful Flowers, A Relaxing Melody, A Sunshine from a Thousand Suns, Dark Gothic Shades) aslo include Glass Panne variants

</details>


**Credits:**

LambdaLuke87: Creator/Owner

ALEXYSSSJ4: Modeler and Artist

ZWF-S-san: Antiplants virus mod OG creator
